## Section 1 — RE-09 Safety Preflight

### What RE-09 is approved to do

RE-09 is approved only to:
- identify any remaining unresolved/orphaned records not handled by RE-01 through RE-08
- mark such records as `blocked`, `quarantined`, or `not_migrated`
- add migration-status metadata without assigning MGA or MasterGroup ownership
- confirm zero eligible unresolved records if none exist
- document records that must remain blocked until future review

### What RE-09 is NOT approved to do

RE-09 must not:
- assign `master_general_agent_id` to any unresolved record
- assign `master_group_id` to any unresolved record
- infer scope from missing parent records
- remap records through missing BenefitCases
- make quarantined records visible
- remove fail-closed protection from migration-pending entities

**Preflight determination:** RE-09 will not perform any of the prohibited actions. All live-data reads confirm zero remaining unresolved records. RE-09 is safe to execute as a zero-mutation confirmation pass.
